creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
When performing a source upgrade from the Jan. -CURRENT snapshot to 9000034, the dialog(3) manpage was updated, but the function-specific manpages (ie: dialog_gauge(3)) are not removed or linked to the new dialog manpage.

I would expect the old pages to be overwritten as the functions do still exist in the base system.

How-To-Repeat: Upgrade from < 900030 to >= 900030
